Figure 19 presents the quantitative validation results,using the same evaluation metrics established in Section 4.2.2 and 4.2.3 The left panel (a) compares the Two-point Correlation Function (𝑆2(𝑟)). Despite the structural complexity of the Ketton sample, the curve of the generated output (red solid line) aligns closely with the Ground Truth (black dashed line). The consistency in the slope at the origin (indicative of specific surface area) and the characteristic length (𝑙𝑐 ≈ 32.2 voxels) confirms that the model successfully captures the granular packing characteristics inherent to oolitic limestone.
